candidate.title: Data/RAG workflow orchestration, streaming ingestion, and table-format lifecycle governance

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Targeted scans over personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw/links found existing source notes for Ray Data, Flink, TEI, DataHub/OpenLineage, Langfuse, vector database projects, security/governance/cost, and evaluation/observability sources. No pre-existing raw/links note directly covered Kafka Connect, Kafka Streams, Apache Airflow, Dagster, Prefect, Apache Iceberg, Delta Lake, or Apache Hudi.
local_checks.wiki_search: Targeted scans over wiki/index.md, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, ingest.md, Data RAG Vector Infrastructure, Data RAG Pipeline Infrastructure, Security Governance Cost Infrastructure, and Evaluation Observability Reliability Infrastructure showed reusable duplicate boundaries for Ray Data batch pipelines, Flink checkpointed streaming, TEI embedding workers, DataHub/OpenLineage lineage, Langfuse RAG traces, Ragas/Phoenix/LangSmith retrieval-quality signals, and quota/security coverage. The existing Data RAG Pipeline page explicitly left Kafka Connect/Streams, Airflow/Dagster/Prefect workflow scheduling, table-format lifecycle governance, deletion/retention propagation, embedding drift policy, retrieval-quality alerting, and incidents as gaps.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki/index.md already linked Data RAG Vector Infrastructure and Data RAG Pipeline Infrastructure. The selected update is non-duplicative because it extends the existing pipeline page with streaming connector, workflow scheduler, and table-format lifecycle boundaries instead of creating a new broad vendor page.

gap_reason: coverage-map.json marked data-rag-vector partial for direct Kafka pipeline docs, workflow scheduler evidence, object-store table-format governance, deletion/retention propagation, embedding drift policy, retrieval-quality alerting, and RAG incident evidence. Local evidence already covered vector indexes, Ray/Flink/TEI pipeline mechanics, lineage, and RAG traces, but it did not provide source-backed coverage for Kafka Connect/Streams, workflow schedulers, or Iceberg/Delta/Hudi lifecycle semantics.

selected_source_candidates.coverage: Existing vector database architecture, retrieval index, filtered retrieval, sparse retrieval, memory placement, and embedding-index lifecycle evidence reused as a downstream duplicate boundary.
Existing Ray Data, Flink, TEI, DataHub/OpenLineage, and Langfuse coverage reused as the upstream pipeline duplicate boundary and target page for the new bounded update.
Existing tenant isolation, quota, cost, and capacity planning coverage reused to keep RAG access policy and governance claims out of the workflow/table lifecycle update unless directly sourced.
Existing LangSmith, Phoenix, Ragas, and OpenTelemetry GenAI coverage reused as duplicate boundary for retrieval-quality evaluation and tracing claims.
Kafka Connect source/sink connector worker/task boundaries and Kafka Streams topology/state-store/changelog recovery boundaries.
Airflow DAG, task, DAG run, scheduler, task state, dependency, and retry boundaries.
Dagster asset, asset dependency, job, run, schedule, sensor, and materialization boundaries.
Prefect flow, task, deployment, schedule, worker, work pool, retry, caching, and timeout boundaries.
Iceberg snapshots, metadata-driven table state, schema/partition evolution, deletes, snapshot expiration, and orphan-file cleanup.
Delta transaction log, DML delete/update/merge operations, schema enforcement/evolution, time travel, VACUUM, and retention.
Hudi copy-on-write/merge-on-read table types, timeline actions, upserts/deletes, schema evolution, compaction, cleaning, and retention.

duplicate_boundaries.vector_database_indexes: Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, pgvector, and FAISS remain downstream vector/retrieval infrastructure; this task does not repeat index algorithm or vector-store architecture coverage.
duplicate_boundaries.ray_flink_tei_lineage_langfuse: Existing Ray Data, Flink, TEI, DataHub/OpenLineage, and Langfuse evidence remains valid for batch refresh, checkpointed streaming, embedding worker, lineage, and RAG trace coverage; the new Kafka/workflow/table sources fill narrower gaps.
duplicate_boundaries.security_governance_cost: Existing tenant isolation, quota, cost attribution, and capacity planning pages remain the authority for platform governance; this task only records table lifecycle and workflow mechanics, not complete RAG access policy or PII controls.
duplicate_boundaries.evaluation_observability: Existing OpenTelemetry, LangSmith, Phoenix, Ragas, and Langfuse coverage remains the duplicate boundary for trace/evaluation mechanics; this task leaves retrieval-quality alerting and incident evidence as future gaps.

git_status_before_task: git status --short returned no changed paths before edits.

shell_probe_blocked_or_auth_sources.evidence: curl -L --max-time 12 -I failed with DNS resolution error in the restricted exec environment; browser tool source opening succeeded for official documentation pages.
